  "findings": [
    "Thermal growth offset was ignored on hot service machinery",
    "Shaft alignment is non-compliant with API 686 tolerances at operating temperature",
    "High risk of premature bearing, seal, and coupling failure due to dynamic misalignment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Schedule an immediate controlled shutdown of the equipment",
    "Perform hot alignment checks or calculate expected thermal growth offsets",
    "Re-align the machine cold with the correct target offsets as per API 686 and manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "Ignoring thermal growth offsets on hot service machinery results in severe misalignment once the equipment reaches operating temperature. This violates API 686 standards and leads to high vibration, accelerated wear, and potential catastrophic failure of bearings and seals while in service.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 3 (Recommended Practices for Machinery Installation and Installation Design - Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Manuals (Thermal Growth Compensation Sections)"
  ]
}
